reviews.comment:
La atención de la cajera es pésima de muy mala gana...y se sabe que los que paramos en un YPF Full a la hora del almuerzo es xq somos viajeros no podes perder una hora esperando una hamburguesa con queso!!!! Es una barabaridad que este una sola persona en la cocina y con cero interés en sacar los pedidos...el lugar se llena y entre la cajera y la cocinera podes salir x donde entraste sin ser atendido bien!

(Translated by Google)
The cashier's service is terrible, she's incredibly rude... and we all know that those of us who stop at a YPF Full at lunchtime are travelers, you can't waste an hour waiting for a cheeseburger! It's outrageous that there's only one person in the kitchen with zero interest in getting the orders out... the place gets packed and between the cashier and the cook, you could leave the way you came in without getting proper service!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7326459960207089806/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNTNjZLcUZ3EAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención y sin demoras, gran variedad de alientos y bebidas en el shop, MUY limpia tanto la estación como el comedor y los baños!

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service and no delays, great variety of food and drinks in the shop, VERY clean both the station and the dining area and the bathrooms!
